subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and is worthy of that Exalted Being Who, through the radiant lights of His Kingdom, hath illumined the realm of earthly existence... and likewise mention of the honored Sina [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت موجودی را لایق و سزاست که بانوار ملکوت عالم ناسوت را … و همچنین ذکر جناب سینا
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
